heading: Definitions
label: 40903 Definitions
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified in a note under , Crimes and Criminal Procedure, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 922 of Title 18

children.heading: Court order
children.label: 1 Court order
children.text: The term “court order” includes a court order (as described in ).section 922(g)(8) of title 18

children.heading: Mental health terms
children.label: 2 Mental health terms
children.text: The terms “adjudicated as a mental defective” and “committed to a mental institution” have the same meanings as in .section 922(g)(4) of title 18

children.heading: Misdemeanor crime of domestic violence
children.label: 3 Misdemeanor crime of domestic violence
children.text: The term “misdemeanor crime of domestic violence” has the meaning given the term in .section 921(a)(33) of title 18
